packageRules.description: Auto-merge patch/pin/digest for all deps once CI is green — routine, low-risk freshness with no human in the loop.
Auto-merge minor updates only for stable (>=1.0.0) deps. Pre-1.0 packages can ship breaking changes in a minor per SemVer, so they are excluded here.
Hold pre-1.0 (0.x) minor updates for manual review — for a 0.x dep the minor position is the breaking boundary (e.g. Agent SDK 0.3 -> 0.4, cf. the 0.1.x -> 0.3.x jump).
Hold all major updates for manual review (breaking changes).
Claude Agent SDK — grouped + labelled. Patch auto-merges (routine); a 0.x minor bump is held by the pre-1.0 rule above.
